title: Issue with monday.listen call
excerpt:
Hi Team, 
I am noticing an issue with the monday.listen function. It is not being triggered on changing values ( this was working the last time I checked ). 
Is there any recent change in this function?

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

I am noticing an issue with the monday.listen function. It is not being triggered on changing values ( this was working the last time I checked ).

Is there any recent change in this function?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @kranthi_thoughtflow,

A fix has been deployed. Would you be able to please try again now?

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday - Thank you. it works now.

Although it is a bit surprising as I did not see this downtime reflect in https://status.monday.com/ .

This callback service is a critical part for our app, and I hope it can added to the list of services being monitored.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @kranthi_thoughtflow,

I am glad it is working now!

This was not downtime, but a small bug that was fixed.

I will of course, share your request with the team!

Cheers,
Matias
